scripts.validate:skill: f="$HOME/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then uv run --with pyyaml python "$f" skill/b2c-mobile-business-launch; else echo 'skill-creator quick_validate not installed; skipping maintainer-only skill lint (expected outside the author machine)'; fi
scripts.audit:ci: npm exec tsc -- --noEmit && npm run audit:links && npm run check:source-registry && npm run check:agent-entrypoints && npm run check:workflow-adherence && npm run
